item.title: Cultural capital
item.description: Two children walk into a museum on a school trip.

item.title: Cultural omnivorousness
item.description: A philosophy professor who keeps a Dolly Parton record next to the Bach on the shelf would have puzzled the sociologist of 1970.

item.title: (1963) Presenting Dionne Warwick
item.description: Artist: Dionne Warwick Released: April 10, 1963 Label: Scepter Records Producer: Burt Bacharach Songwriters: Burt Bacharach and Hal David Genre: Primary: Pop soul Secondary: Soul jazz Scene: Brill Building RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Most Brill Building records in 1963 moved in 4/4 time and stayed ...

item.title: (1964) Presenting the Fabulous Ronettes Featuring Veronica
item.description: Artist: The Ronettes Released: November 1964 Label: Philles Records Producer: Phil Spector Studio: Gold Star Studios Genre: Primary: Girl group, Brill Building Secondary: Pop soul, baroque pop RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Four seconds.

item.title: (1965) The Beach Boys Today!
item.description: Artist: The Beach Boys Released: March 8, 1965 Label: Capitol Records Producer: Brian Wilson Studio: Western Recorders, Gold Star Studios, RCA Victor Studios Genre: Primary: Pop rock, baroque pop Secondary: Sunshine pop, vocal surf, vocal group RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Side B of this record is w...

item.title: (1967) Reach Out
item.description: Artist: The Four Tops Released: July 1967 Label: Motown Records Producer: Holland-Dozier-Holland Genre: Primary: Motown sound Secondary: Baroque pop, rhythm & blues, Brill Building RYM · Apple Music · Spotify “Reach Out, I’ll Be There” builds like an emergency.

item.title: (1968) Eli and the Thirteenth Confession
item.description: Artist: Laura Nyro Released: March 3, 1968 Label: Columbia Records Producer: Laura Nyro and Charlie Calello Studio: CBS 30th Street Studio Genre: Primary: Pop soul, singer-songwriter, progressive soul Secondary: Brill Building, jazz pop, vocal jazz, progressive soul, sunshine pop, art pop Scene: Ne...

item.title: Bourdieu — Distinction
item.description: Author: Pierre Bourdieu Title: Distinction: A Social Critique of the Judgement of Taste Year: 1984 (French original, La Distinction, 1979) Publisher: Harvard University Press Type: Book Bourdieu’s 1960s French survey asked people which of three pieces of music they most admired — Bach’s The Well-Tem...

item.title: Brooks — Liner Notes for the Revolution
